title: ilex ebenacea
intro: Ilex ebenacea, also known as American Holly, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America, characterized by its prickly leaves and red berries. Traditionally, American Holly has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and to support the immune system. The health benefits of Ilex ebenacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and even help to prevent the development of certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, American Holly is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
